instruction:
Evaluate the definite integral. Express answer in exact form whenever possible:
$$
\int_{0}^\pi \sin\left(\frac{ 1 }{ 2 } \cdot x\right) \cdot \cos\left(\frac{ 1 }{ 4 } \cdot x\right) \, dx
$$

Options:
A. 8-2*sqrt(2)/9
B. 8-2*sqrt(2)/12
C. 8-2*sqrt(2)/6
D. 8-2*sqrt(2)/8
E. 8-2*sqrt(2)/4
F. 8-2*sqrt(2)/3
G. 8-2*sqrt(2)/7
H. 8-2*sqrt(2)/10
I. 8-2*sqrt(2)/5
J. 8-2*sqrt(2)/2
